Who We Are

Your Trusted Partner in Petroleum Equipment

SNB ENGG are distributors of high-quality nozzles, hose pipes, swivel joints, and a full range of fuel station equipment. We work directly with premium manufacturers to bring you reliable, industry-standard products for every petroleum infrastructure need.

We believe in providing quality products to our customers — always sourced from premium-grade materials, always backed by our expertise and commitment to your satisfaction.

✦
Authorised distributors of leading petroleum equipment manufacturers
✦
All products sourced from premium quality materials
✦
Products customisable to your exact specifications
✦
Dedicated support from enquiry through to delivery

What We Supply

Our Product Range

Every product is available in standard specifications or customised to your project requirements. Click a category to explore.

Fuel Dispenser System

Complete dispenser systems including nozzles, hose assemblies, swivel joints, and breakaway couplings.

View Range

Hanging Hardware

Overhead hose reels, retractors, swivel mounts, and hanging kits for organised forecourt dispensing.

View Range

HDPE Pipe & Accessories

Double-wall HDPE underground piping, electrofusion fittings, transition connectors, and sumps.

Enquire About This Product
Fuel Management System

Automated Fuel Management

An end-to-end automated fuel management platform — real-time monitoring, remote dispensing, high-flow unloading, and intelligent alerts for complete operational control.

Real-Time Monitoring

Live visibility of fuel levels, dispensing activity, and equipment usage across all field devices.

Automated Dispensing

Remote-controlled dispensing with safety interlocks, approvals, and flow control built in.

Data Accuracy

Eliminates manual errors — accurate fuel accounting with automated daily and weekly reports.

Alerts & Notifications

Email alerts, SMS and push notifications for low fuel, high usage, and critical events.

Enhanced Security

Role-based access for operators, managers, and admins with activity logs and real-time alerts.

High Flow Unloading

200 to 2000 LPM unloading system integrated with automated remote dispensing control.

About / Our Founders
Leadership & Vision

The People Behind
SNB Engg.

A shared passion for quality, reliability, and customer satisfaction — driving India's fuel infrastructure forward since 2019.

Founder & CEO
Mr. Mukesh Vishwas
SNB Engg.
"Operational excellence and strategic growth — we deliver dependable solutions that our clients can count on."

Mr Mukesh founded SNB Engg. and leads the company as CEO, driving strategic growth and day-to-day operational excellence. His hands-on leadership has been instrumental in building a diverse product portfolio — from fuel dispensers and HDPE piping systems to hanging hardware and safety accessories.

His approach centres on maintaining strong industry partnerships and ensuring that every product meets the technical standards and functional expectations that modern fuel management demands. Under his direction, SNB Engg. continues to expand its reach across India's fuel retail and industrial sectors.

Strategic Growth Operations Industry Partnerships Pan India
Co-Founder & Proprietor
Mrs. Pooja Sharma
SNB Engg.
"Quality products and lasting relationships — that's the foundation we built SNB Engg. on."

Miss Pooja is the founding force behind SNB Engg. With a deep commitment to quality and customer satisfaction, she established the company in Mumbai, Maharashtra in 2019 with a clear mission — to become a trusted supplier of fuel dispensing equipment and petroleum infrastructure products across India.

Her vision of transparent, professional service has defined how SNB Engg. operates — from the first enquiry to the final delivery. Under her guidance, the company has grown into a recognised name in the fuel station equipment space, serving petrol pumps, industrial facilities, and commercial operations nationwide.

Company Vision Client Relationships Quality Assurance Est. 2019
Our Story

Built on Trust.
Driven by Quality.

At SNB Engg., we are committed to delivering dependable and efficient solutions in the field of fuel dispensing equipment. Established in 2019 and located in Mumbai, Maharashtra, our company operates as a trusted trader and supplier of advanced fuel dispensing systems designed to meet the evolving requirements of modern fuel management.

With a focus on quality, performance, and customer satisfaction, we supply products that help businesses operate their fuel distribution processes smoothly and efficiently — from single-nozzle dispensers to complete HDPE underground piping systems.

Our business philosophy is centred on building lasting relationships through transparency, reliability, and professional service. From understanding specific needs to ensuring timely product availability, our team works diligently to provide a smooth and satisfactory experience for every client we serve.
